segments.text: I will praise you, LORD, with all my heart; I will tell of all the marvelous things you do.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will be filled with joy because of you and will sing praises to your name, O Most High.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My enemies will retreat when you appear, they will stumble and perish before you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For you have maintained my just cause; you sit on your throne judging right.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: maintained my judgment: Heb. made my judgment
judging right: Heb. judging in righteousness

segments.text: You have rebuked the nations and destroyed the wicked; you have erased their name forever and ever.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Endless ruin has overtaken the enemy, you have uprooted their cities; even the memory of them has perished.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: O thou: or, The destructions of the enemy are come to a perpetual end: and their cities hast thou destroyed

segments.text: But the LORD reigns forever, executing judgment from his throne.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: He will judge the world with justice and rule the nations with fairness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: a refuge: Heb. an high place

segments.text: Those who know your name trust in you, for you, LORD, do not abandon those who seek you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Sing praises to the LORD, who sits enthroned in Zion; proclaim among the nations what he has done.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For he who avenges blood remembers; he does not ignore the cries of the afflicted.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: LORD, see how my enemies torment me. Lift me up from the gates of death,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: that I may declare your praises in the gates of Daughter Zion, and there rejoice in your salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The nations have fallen into the pit they have dug; their feet are caught in the net they have hidden.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The LORD is known by his acts of justice; the wicked are ensnared by the work of their hands. Higgaion Selah
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The wicked go down to the realm of the dead, all the nations that forget God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But God will never forget the needy; the hope of the afflicted will never perish.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arise, LORD, do not let humans triumph; let the nations be judged in your presence.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Strike them with terror, LORD; let the nations know they are only human.
segments.speaker: David
